_comment: ALC LLA Book 24 (Language Laboratory Activities): PDF → Markdown. Paths relative to this file.
splitInstructions:
- This is an American Language Course (ALC) Language Laboratory Activities book.
- Split at top-level boundaries: each new LESSON (e.g. "LESSON 24A", "LESSON 24B") and each major back-matter section (SCRIPTS / AUDIO SCRIPT / ANSWERS) is its own split.
- Do NOT split for individual Figures or minor sub-sections.
